About

I've unified fragmented revenue data into a single source of truth, driven a 10%+ lift in customer retention, and cut reporting turnaround from hours to minutes. By building the data infrastructure that lets revenue, sales, and client teams act on the numbers right away.

That infrastructure spans the full stack: I design the ETL/ELT pipelines and warehouse models underneath, then build the dashboards and reporting layers on top, so the work shows up as decisions, not just data. With 5+ years across marketing science, analytics engineering, and data architecture, I move as easily through deep SQL/warehouse work as I do business-facing strategy. Bridging data architecture and business impact is where I do my best work.

Experience

Data Architecture Analyst II

StackAdapt · Toronto, ON

2025-01 - present

  • Led a cross-functional workstream to establish a single source of truth for revenue data across the company.
  • Built and analyzed customer retention & recurring-revenue dashboards, improving retention 10%+ and enabling upsell opportunities that drove a 20%+ revenue increase.
  • Cut third-party research turnaround from 8 hours to under 1 hour using custom GPT workflows and external data providers.
  • Designed an Portfolio Overview dashboard improving portfolio visibility and cutting Account Manager workload by 12% (~5 hrs saved per AM) across a 500+ person sales org with 400+ sales adoptions.
  • Automated CTV Publisher Overlap analysis, helping clients identify inventory redundancy and resulting in a $640K incremental budget win.
  • Led Digital-Out-of-Home (DOOH) strategy, driving 30%+ budget lift and influencing the DOOH product roadmap via client feedback.
  • Drove adoption of first-party data integrations, unlocking $1M+ budget shifts for enterprise clients; identified that 4% of clients generated 15% of revenue and scaled that pattern across key accounts.
  • Consolidated revenue data into Snowflake for RevOps. Influencing scoring system, lowering storage costs and aligning reporting across departments.
